reviews.comment:
Combustibles y bar buenos. Aunque el bar no  abre 24 horas y los baños no reciben mantenimiento durante la noche.

(Translated by Google)
Good fuel and bar. However, the bar isn't open 24 hours and the restrooms aren't maintained overnight.

reviews.comment:
Imperdibles. La atención de Rubén y el sándwich de crudo y queso tostado en pan árabe.

(Translated by Google)
Don't miss it. Rubén's service and the raw meat and toasted cheese sandwich on pita bread.

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación! Un punto casi obligado de parada en mis viajes al norte. Buena atención, sanitarios siempre limpios y siempre hay lugar para estacionar

(Translated by Google)
Excellent station! A near-mandatory stop on my trips north. Great service, always clean restrooms, and always parking available.

reviews.comment:
Muy limpio atencion Buena Perro lo Marlo que a law 22hs no te atienden en la cafeteria  no kiosco.

(Translated by Google)
Very clean, good service. The Marlo dog is that at 10pm they don't serve you in the cafeteria or kiosk.
